sp_widget.name: Create Problem from Incident
sp_widget.description: Allows L2 Support Team members to create a problem record from an existing incident. Only visible to L2 agents.
sp_widget.template:
Access Denied

Only L2 Support Team members can create problem records.

Create Problem from Incident

Create a problem record to investigate and track recurring issues

Problem Created Successfully!

{{c.successMessage}}

View Problem
{{c.errorMessage}}

Step 1: Select Source Incident

{{inc.number}}
{{inc.short_description}}
{{inc.state_label}} {{inc.category}}
No incidents found matching "{{c.searchQuery}}"
Selected Incident: {{c.selectedIncident.number}} - {{c.selectedIncident.short_description}}
Category: {{c.selectedIncident.category}} / {{c.selectedIncident.subcategory}} | Caller: {{c.selectedIncident.caller_name}} | Group: {{c.selectedIncident.assignment_group_name}}

Step 2: Confirm & Create Problem

The problem will be created with the following fields copied from the incident:

  • Short Description: Problem: {{c.selectedIncident.short_description}}
  • Category: {{c.selectedIncident.category}}
  • Subcategory: {{c.selectedIncident.subcategory}}
  • Urgency / Impact: {{c.selectedIncident.urgency_label}} / {{c.selectedIncident.urgency_label}}

The incident will be linked to the problem, and the assignment group will be set to the incident's current group.

Searching...
